name: Cereal Killer Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a small bowl, mix oats with brickle chips.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together into a separate bowl.
4. In a food processor or large mixing bowl, blend sugars until smooth.
5. Gradually add butter, processing until creamy and well combined.
6. Add eggs and vanilla extract, continuing to process until fully incorporated.
7. Mix in the sifted flour mixture just until combined.
8. Using an 1/8 cup measure, scoop dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing balls about 3 inches apart.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Cool on wire racks.
